model: For a cell j visited at time t_j, accumulated thermal exposure is computed from all previously scanned cells i: H_j = sum_i A * exp(-alpha*(t_j - t_i)) * exp(-beta*d_ij), where t_j > t_i.

risk_metrics.exceedance_count: number of cells with H_j > H_crit

recommended_local_relation_use: For local heat-coupling models, users may start from pairs in local_geometry_relations.csv, or filter transition_matrix.csv using local_relation_flag == 1.
